description: Autonomous Parking Assist (APA) Logic State Machine — Mobileye Parking_Applications

Abort.description: Maneuver aborted by driver or system due to non-critical conditions. Vehicle is safely stopped: P gear applied, EPB engaged, turn signals cancelled. ResetParkingSignals() called. Driver fully resumes control.

DRIVER_ACKNOWLEDGES.description: Driver acknowledges abort message on HMI and exits.

RETRY_PARK_IN.description: Driver chooses to retry scanning for a new spot (DrvrAsscSysBtnPush = SelectAutomaticParking).

Idle.description: APA system is inactive. No parking session in progress. Driver has not activated APA.

APA_BUTTON_PRESSED.description: Driver presses APA button (DrvrAsscSysBtnPush = EnterAPA) or automatic activation (AutActvPrkgFctSwt = On)

RPA_BUTTON_PRESSED.description: Remote Park Assist activation via Key Fob (MobDevRPAReq = Start)

ParkActive.description: Autonomous parking maneuver is actively executing. System controls steering and longitudinal motion (forward/reverse passes). HMI shows trajectory and obstacle proximity. Driver supervises but system drives. Turn signals activated as needed.

CRITICAL_FAILURE.description: Critical system/vehicle failure during maneuver: ADCU failure, vehicle failure, lateral/longitudinal control failure (PrkLatLgtFailr), SteerStsToParkAssi fault, BrkSysSts = Fault.

DRIVER_ABORT.description: Driver explicitly aborts the maneuver (DrvrAsscSysBtnPush = Abort).

DRIVER_INTERVENTION.description: Driver overrides: accelerator pedal pressed (AccrPedlPsd = Yes), steering torque override (SteerStsToParkAssi = SteerAbortByDrvrIntv), or door opened during maneuver.

DRIVER_SUSPEND.description: Driver requests temporary pause (DrvrAsscSysBtnPush = Suspend / PrkgIntrptReldBtn = NotContinue).

MANEUVER_COMPLETE.description: Vehicle successfully parked within defined tolerances. KPI evaluation triggered.

ODD_EXIT.description: Vehicle exits ODD during maneuver (e.g., speed exceeds limit, critical USS/camera fault detected).

SPOT_PARTIALLY_OBSCURED.description: If spot is partially obscured: attempt next adjacent spot on same side (same-side fallback logic).

ParkComplete.description: Parking maneuver successfully completed. Vehicle is within the defined parking spot tolerances. EPB applied, gear set to P. KPI compliance evaluated (APA-KPI-REQ-011). HMI displays success. Park Out option becomes available if ParkOutValid() conditions are met.

DRIVER_ACKNOWLEDGES.description: Driver acknowledges completion and exits APA session.

PARK_OUT_REQUESTED.description: Driver requests Park Out (DrvrAsscSysBtnPush = ConfirmParkOut). Valid only if ParkOutValid() = true (drive distance and speed constraints from wakeup point met).

RPA_EXIT_REQUESTED.description: Remote Park Out requested via Key Fob (MobDevRPAReqRPAReq = RPA_Park_Out_Req).

ParkFailure.description: Critical failure DURING active maneuver. Vehicle brought to immediate safe stop: P gear + EPB applied, turn signals cancelled, ResetParkingSignals() called. DrvrAsscSysDisp error output set (0x30–0x35 priority 1–5). Driver must take immediate control.

DRIVER_ACKNOWLEDGES.description: Driver acknowledges the failure and takes control. Session ends.

ParkHold.description: Maneuver temporarily paused. Vehicle is held stationary (EPB applied, P gear if needed). Driver can choose to resume or cancel. HMI prompts driver for action.

CRITICAL_FAILURE.description: Critical system failure detected while in hold state.

DRIVER_CANCEL.description: Driver decides not to continue (DrvrAsscSysBtnPush = Abort / PrkgIntrptReldBtn = NotContinue).

DRIVER_RESUMES.description: Driver resumes maneuver (DrvrAsscSysBtnPush = Continue / PrkgIntrptReldBtn = Continue).

HOLD_TIMEOUT.description: Hold timeout expired with no driver action; system safely aborts.

PreParkActive.description: Spot confirmed. Vehicle stops. System prepares trajectory. Driver is instructed to stop the vehicle and approve maneuver start. System requests longitudinal control (AsyALgtCtrlMod = APA) and lateral control (AsyLatCtrlModReq = APA).

DRIVER_APPROVES_MANEUVER.description: Driver approves start of autonomous maneuver (DrvrAsscSysBtnPush = StartParking / ConfirmButton). Vehicle is stationary, EPB or brake hold engaged.

DRIVER_CANCEL.description: Driver cancels before maneuver starts (DrvrAsscSysBtnPush = Abort / ExitAPA).

DRIVER_SUSPEND.description: Driver presses Suspend (DrvrAsscSysBtnPush = Suspend) to temporarily pause.

ODD_VIOLATION.description: Critical failure before maneuver start (ADCU failure, vehicle failure, severe sensor fault).

SPOT_NOT_AVAILABLE.description: Selected spot becomes unavailable; revert to searching for next spot.

PreParkFailure.description: APA cannot be activated or maintained due to ODD/precondition failure BEFORE maneuver started. DrvrAsscSysDisp output set per error priority table (0x30–0x4F). Reason displayed on HMI (e.g., road slope, rain, USS fault, ADCU failure).

FAILURE_CLEARED.description: Failure condition is resolved; system returns to idle.

PreSearch.description: APA is activated. System is initializing and checking preconditions (ODD validation, sensor health, vehicle speed, gear, etc.) before scanning for parking spots.

DRIVER_CANCEL.description: Driver presses Cancel (DrvrAsscSysBtnPush = ExitAPA or Abort).

PRECONDITIONS_FAILED.description: ODD conditions not met (e.g., VehicleFailure, ADCUFailure, camera/USS/RADAR fault, road slope exceeded).

PRECONDITIONS_MET.description: All ODD conditions satisfied: vehicle speed within range, sensors operational, no system failures.

Search.description: APA is actively scanning for available parking spots while the driver drives slowly along the road. Detected spots are displayed on the HMI. Driver remains fully responsible.

ODD_VIOLATION.description: An ODD condition is violated during search (sensor failure, speed exceeded, etc.).

SPOT_DETECTED.description: One or more valid parking spots detected and presented to driver on AVD UI.

SpotPresentation.description: Detected parking spots are shown to the driver on the HMI. Driver can browse, select, or confirm a spot. System may highlight a recommended slot (RecommendSlotInAPAGrpPrkgSlotSlctByDrvr). Driver can also manually choose a spot (CustomPrkgLotSwt / PrkgTouchCoornReq).

DRIVER_CONFIRMS_SPOT.description: Driver selects and confirms a parking spot (DrvrAsscSysBtnPush = StartParking or ConfirmButton).

DRIVER_SELECTS_PARK_OUT.description: Driver selects Park Out mode (DrvrFbOfPrkgMod2 = HorizontalLeftParkingOut / PerpendicularParkingOut etc.).

ODD_VIOLATION.description: System or vehicle failure detected during spot presentation.

SPOT_LOST.description: Previously detected spot is no longer available; return to searching.
